description: Teach the compiler to publish interface facts. `DefineModule` should derive and publish `ModuleInterface(module)` from already-minted callable identities for local source-defined modules, including protocol modules and synthesized helpers like `__info__/1`. Add the runtime/external seeding path so a module can publish `ModuleInterface` without requiring `ModuleDefined`. Signal: local and non-local modules share one interface fact shape, and external-interface consumers no longer need placeholder `ModuleDefined` waits just to see exports.
title: Compiler2 interface publication: publish ModuleInterface for local modules and seed runtime/external interfaces
